summary: Markets show mixed sentiment with cryptocurrencies facing downward pressure and support tests amid recent pullbacks, while gold maintains strength as a safe-haven amid geopolitical tensions. Commodities like crude oil and traditional assets exhibit resilience, but limited fresh commentary today points to cautious trading. Overall mood leans neutral with bearish tilts in crypto and bullish safe-haven flows.
